event.description: A web server is created using the insecure `HTTP` scheme. As a result, application data is transmitted over an insecure channel where it can be read and modified by attackers.

Use the `https` library instead of the `http` library, or use the `createServer` method of the `http-server` library with the `https` option set to `true` to avoid sending data over the network in cleartext.

typePropertiesGroup.longDescription: A web server is created using the insecure `HTTP` scheme. As a result, application data is transmitted over an insecure channel where it can be read and modified by attackers.
